element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player learns directional dodging and sustained fire
player learns to prioritize pickups while managing position
player learns screen-clear utility and tactical deployment timing
player learns attack pattern recognition and sustained engagement
player manages multi-threat environment, spatial awareness
two-player synergy mechanic requiring position coordination
player learns tactical item management following death
player learns to weaponize own destruction as stage hazard
peak execution of all learned mechanics under maximum pressure
extreme skill gate: restart cycle with amplified enemy patterns

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Vertically scrolling constant flow with wave-based enemy intensity peaks and procedural boss battles; tension accumulates across 8-stage progression with deliberate difficulty ramp; relief comes from temporary power states and stage completions; cooperative mode adds secondary rhythm layer through synchronized player positioning requirements

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stages 1-2: foundational pattern learning with manageable enemy density and clear firing lanes; bomb and weapon pickups establish resource management baseline
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 3-6: escalating enemy formations and boss complexity; player executes learned dodging and pattern recognition under increasing bullet density; cooperative mechanics fully utilized in 2-player context
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 7-8: sustained high intensity with dense enemy waves and complex boss attack sequences; minimal relief windows; demands reflexive execution of all prior mechanics simultaneously
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (end stage 1): introduces sustained pattern-based engagement
Stage 3 transition: noticeable jump in enemy spawn density
Stage 8 final stage: extreme difficulty spike designed as completion skill gate
Post-completion loop restart: difficulty amplification creates hard skill ceiling for extended play

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear vertical progression with three difficulty phases: opening enemy waves (low density), mid-stage escalation (medium density), boss encounter (pattern-based single/dual antagonist). Each stage ends with boss defeat checkpoint.
Enemy spawning follows compressed waves of increasing density within single stage; brief gaps between waves provide relief and pickup collection windows; boss encounter concludes stage

Early stages feature basic single-shot enemies; mid-stages introduce multi-directional fire patterns; late stages combine high density with complex targeting; cooperates with vertical scroll speed consistency
Boss appears at stage end following short calm; features distinct attack phases with recognizable patterns; phases escalate in speed and complexity; defeat triggers stage clear and difficulty bump

Weapon power-ups and bombs scattered throughout stage; positioned to require player to deviate from optimal survival paths; medals placed in high-risk positions to encourage risk-taking during calm phases
